title: Drone-Based Supply Delivery Network
description: Use a network of delivery drones to drop emergency supplies (food, medicine, first aid kits) to areas inaccessible by road during floods and landslides. Drones can be pre-positioned at district HQs.
author: Mohammed Irfan

comments.text: This could save lives in Assam floods. We need waterproof packaging.

title: Community Mesh Network for Offline Communication
description: Deploy portable mesh networking devices in crisis zones where telecom infrastructure is damaged. Allows text messaging and GPS sharing without internet.
author: Deepak Sharma

comments.text: Government is willing to fund a pilot program for this.

title: Solar-Powered Mobile Charging Stations
description: Deploy solar-powered charging stations at relief camps so affected people can charge their phones and stay connected with family and emergency services.
author: Rajesh Kumar

comments.text: We deployed 50 units during Kerala floods. Huge success!

title: Multilingual Crisis Alert Voice Bot
description: Create an automated voice calling system that delivers crisis alerts in 10+ regional languages. Especially useful for elderly and low-literacy populations.
author: Meena Kumari

comments.text: This is crucial for reaching rural communities.

title: Volunteer Carpooling App Integration
description: Integrate with ride-sharing apps to enable volunteer carpooling to crisis zones. Reduces transport costs and carbon footprint.
author: Sneha Reddy

title: AI-Powered Damage Assessment from Satellite Images
description: Use machine learning models to automatically assess building damage and flood extent from satellite imagery, enabling faster resource allocation.
author: Karan Malhotra

comments.text: We can use open-source satellite data from Sentinel-2.

title: Community Kitchen Network During Crises
description: Create a pre-registered network of community kitchens, temples, gurudwaras, and restaurants willing to cook meals during emergencies. Coordinate via the platform.
author: Anita Devi

comments.text: I can coordinate 15 kitchens in Nagpur.
This is now an official program under CrisisConnect.

title: Blockchain-Based Donation Transparency
description: Use blockchain to track every donation from source to delivery, ensuring complete transparency and reducing fraud in disaster relief funding.
author: Vikram Choudhary

title: Portable Water Purification Units
description: Deploy low-cost, portable water purification units that can be carried to remote areas. Each unit can serve 500 people per day using solar power.
author: Sanjay Pillai

comments.text: Already deployed 20 units in Rajasthan drought areas.

title: Mental Health First Aid Training Program
description: Launch free online training modules for volunteers on mental health first aid, trauma response, and psychological support for disaster survivors.
author: Lakshmi Iyer

comments.text: I can help design the curriculum.
